content.en:
In the world of water, the strength of the water source beast is not weak at all, and they all have the combat power of the Dao ancestor level.

However, the Dao Ancestors who were able to enter here were all the strongest Dao Ancestors or above, so these Water Source Beasts were no opponents at all, and they were slaughtered by the Dao Ancestors.

Ye Tian also easily killed one water source beast after another and collected their corpses.

The water world is very large, and the number of water source beasts is also quite large, but the water source beasts have the combat power of Dao Ancestors, but their life-saving ability is very poor, and the strength of the strongest Dao Ancestors is too strong, so they are quickly killed.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian and the other Supreme Dao Ancestors came to the Earth World, and as soon as they came here, they sensed the battle of the Half-Step Domain Ancestors.

Thundered!!!!

The terrifying aftermath of the battle was transmitted from somewhere in the Earth World, so that many Supreme Dao Ancestors and Invincible Dao Ancestors did not dare to enter that place, for fear that if one of them was not good, they would be killed by the aftermath.

Many Dao Ancestors were very curious, why did these half-step domain ancestors fight?

There is no doubt that it must be a treasure of high value, otherwise there is no need to fight each other.

Somewhere in the earth world.

Grains of sand float in the air, as if they were fixed here.

And the Qinglong Palace Lord and the Eternal Dao Ancestor were all snatching this grain of sand, and they did not hesitate to fight for this, causing this piece of void to crack continuously.

This was not ordinary sand, but the sand of all things and stars, and for them, half-step domain ancestors, these sand were true treasures.

The Star Sand of All Things can help the half-step domain ancestors break the shackles of the physical body, and they can have up to one percent of the physical body power of the domain ancestor, this level of physical body is also called the physical body realm of all things, and the strength can beat other half-step domain ancestors.

The Qinglong Palace Lord is very powerful, but he has not condensed the physical body realm of all things, so he also wants to seize these stars and sands of all things, so as to break the shackles of the physical body and reach the physical realm of all things.

In this way, his strength would skyrocket, completely surpassing the ordinary half-step domain ancestor.

But one or two grains of the Ten Thousand Star Sand are definitely not enough, so they need to snatch the Ten Thousand Things Star Sand as much as possible.

Abrupt.

A black shadow tore through the void and snatched out three grains of the Star Sand, attracting everyone's attention.

"Who?"

The Blue Dragon Palace Lord was furious and attacked the other party with a single blow of the Forbidden Dao Technique, but was calmly blocked by the other party.

Obviously, this is also a half-step domain ancestor, but the other party covers his face and breath, and he can't see through his identity at all.

"Your Excellency is the half-step domain ancestor of Black Wind Mountain!"

The main road of the Qinglong Palace.

Anyway, this person is definitely not the palace master of the Heavenly Emperor Palace, he can be sure of this.

When the Eternal Dao Ancestor heard this, he sneered: "Don't appear as a strange half-step domain ancestor and say that it is our half-step domain ancestor of Black Wind Mountain, our Black Wind Mountain does not have so many half-step domain ancestors, maybe it is the half-step domain ancestor of your Heavenly Emperor Palace, everyone be careful, lest you be attacked by the people of Heavenly Emperor Palace!"

"It doesn't matter which force's half-step domain ancestor I am, the point is that I am also qualified to compete for the Ten Thousand Stars Sand!"

The mysterious half-step domain ancestor said in a low voice.

The Blue Dragon Palace Lord snorted coldly, and instead of stopping this half-step domain ancestor, he continued to snatch the Everything Star Sand in other places.

There weren't a lot of Star Sand in this area, and it was quickly snatched up by these half-step domain ancestors.

And the half-step domain ancestors fought each other and wanted to separate life and death, but it was not very short to end, so they did not fight, but continued to search for the stars and sands of all things in the earth world.

Many Supreme Dao Ancestors and Invincible Dao Ancestors have not left the Earth World, and they are also looking for treasures in the Earth World.

After all, this place can give birth to a treasure that even the half-step domain ancestors crave, if they find one, wouldn't it be a haircut?

......

"Father, what kind of treasure are the half-step domain ancestors fighting for?"

Ye Xingchen asked curiously.

"I don't know!" Ye Tian shook his head, "But let's be careful, try not to meet with the half-step domain ancestors!"

He unfolded his copying talent from moment to moment, surveyed the situation around him, and once he found that a half-step domain ancestor was approaching, he would leave with his son and daughter.

Abrupt.

Ye Tian saw that there was a grain of sand in front of him that was actually suspended in the air, and his divine sense couldn't sense it.

"It's ......"

Ye Tian stared at this grain of sand, and recalled the records of similar treasures in his mind.

"It's the sand of all things, and there is a record of it in the treasure house of the Wind Mountain!"

Ye Tian was shocked.

The Star Sand of All Things was born in the land where the rules of the forbidden earth are strong, and it is possible to condense a grain of billions of years before it is possible, and the value is incomparably precious, basically from some of the initial realms of the dark forbidden realm that contain the power of the origin of the rules of the earth.

And the world of the earth in the inner body of the Darkwing Dapeng Eagle actually gave birth to all things and stars.

At this moment, Ye Tian finally understood why the Half-Step Domain Ancestors were fighting, it must be for the sake of the Star Sand.

Once he has enough of the Star Sand of All Things, the Half-Step Domain Ancestor can break the limit of the physical body and step into the realm of the Physical Body of All Things, and his strength is above the other half-step Domain Ancestors, then it is equivalent to another level of powerhouse.

Wow!

Ye Tian pinched this grain of Everything Star Sand, tried his best to take it away, and then put it into the universe world in his body.

And this step took him a few seconds, and fortunately there was no half-step Domain Ancestor here, otherwise he wouldn't want to snatch the Star Sand of Everything at such a slow speed.

"The Ten Thousand Things Star Sand can't be perceived with divine sense, it can only be observed by the eyes, so the half-step domain ancestors don't have much advantage over me, and they can only slowly look for the Ten Thousand Things Star Sand!

Ye Tian muttered.

He also wants the Star Sand, but there is no good way to find the Star Sand.

With the passage of time, there are more and more supreme Dao Ancestors and invincible Dao Ancestors in the Earth World, perhaps the news of the Star Sand of All Things has leaked, causing them to also look for the Star Sand of All Things.

Abrupt.

Ye Tian's copying talent sensed the existence of a creature under the earth world, and through the introduction of this creature, he learned about the ability of this creature.

"Star Sand Beast!"

This is a forbidden bloodline creature comparable to Dao Ancestor, but this creature can sense the existence of the Ten Thousand Stars Sand, as if it has a similar connection with the Ten Thousand Stars Sand.

However, the Star Sand Beast is not interested in the Star Sand, and even has some disgust with the Star Sand.

This is like the star sand beast and all things star sand are mutually restrictive, and all things are mutually restrictive, this is the principle.

Seeing the effect of the Star Sand Beast, Ye Tian smiled.

He knew how he was going to get more of the Star Sands!
